title: Tao Te Ching 35
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 35 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 35 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: He who holds the great image will attract all under heaven. They come and do not suffer harm, but enjoy safety, peace, and contentment.
